Regards

Yes, I am with THe Telegraph. You can mail me at jhinuk.mazumdar@abp.in. Please leave your contact number in the mail for clarifications. Thanks.
Yes, I am with THe Telegraph. You can mail me at jhinuk.mazumdar@abp.in. Please leave your contact number in the mail for clarifications. Thanks.

HI In case you are the one who is working with ABP, (if not pls ignore this friend request

I am pawan lohia from Ernst & Young Kolkata. I had met you at the Chetan Bhagat's program in Saturday Club (I interacted with you when you were interviewing Ravi bagri the Banker). I have an interesting story which in my opinion is worth a coverage in t2. Do let me know yr mail ID, I will have it send to you for your consideration.

Cheers

Pawan Lohia
